results.description:
The first book in the beloved small-town Chestnut Springs series from the no.1 Sunday Times bestselling author and Queen of Cowboy romance, Elsie Silver.

'No one really does it better than Elsie Silver' THE RADIO TIMES

'Elsie Silver is rapidly becoming one of my favourite romance authors' DAILY MAIL

🤠

"You wear the hat, you ride the cowboy."

Rhett Eaton lives for three things: riding bulls, causing trouble, and doing exactly what he wants. But when an outburst threatens his career, his team brings in a professional babysitter. Enter Summer Hamilton, his agent's daughter.

She has no interest in rodeos, cowboys, or babysitting overgrown man-children. Too bad she's stuck with Rhett for the entire season. He's arrogant. She's uptight. He thinks rules are made to be broken. She wrote the rulebook. But somewhere between the fake smiles, endless road trips, and the occasional hotel mix-up that leaves them sharing a bed, the line between enemies and something much more starts to blur.

Summer says there are boundaries they shouldn't cross. That his reputation can't take any more hits and neither can her damaged heart.

Rhett says he's going to steal it anyway.

⭐

READERS THINK ELSIE SILVER IS SIMPLY FLAWLESS

'Elsie Silver, Queen of Cowboy' THE TIMES
'Elsie Silver's writing is a true revelation!' ALI HAZELWOOD

'This book contains a hero to die for' TESSA BAILEY

'Heartwarming, sensual and thoroughly addicting' ANA HUANG

'Elsie Silver just hits the mark every time' READER REVIEW

'Each book is heart-wrenching in its own way' READER REVIEW

'The story is so well done that it turned me into a complete cowboy fangirl' READER REVIEW

'These books had me so sucked into the world that I barely looked up' READER REVIEW

*Elsie Silver became an instant Sunday Times bestselling author on the 2nd week of April 2024.
